title: scutellaria angulosa var. franchetiana
intro: Scutellaria angulosa var. franchetiana, also known as Baikal skullcap, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family, characterized by its unique angular shape and medicinal properties. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Baikal skullcap include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Baikal skullcap is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are typically standardized to contain a specific amount of active compounds, allowing for a standardized dose of the plant's medicinal properties.
